_description: Design tokens extracted from the Trogen Facility Services project. Use as reference when building similar cleaning/service industry websites.
_project: Trogen Facility Services — Melbourne Cleaning Company

colors.primary_note: Trust blue — used for headings, borders, overlines, active nav items
colors.dark_note: Dark navy — used for hero bg, footer bg, dark sections, body text
colors.accent_note: WhatsApp green — used for all primary CTA buttons (WhatsApp is main contact method)
colors.light_note: Soft blue tint — used for alternating section backgrounds, card fills
colors.yellow_cta_note: Yellow — used for secondary CTAs (call-to-action buttons, quote form submit)
colors.white_note: Default section background, card backgrounds, header background
colors.text_body_note: Dark slate — used for body/paragraph text on light backgrounds
colors.text_light_note: Light slate — used for body text on dark backgrounds
colors.border_light_note: Light gray — used for card borders, dividers on light backgrounds

typography.heading_note: Extra bold Figtree for all headings — gives modern, strong feel
typography.body_note: Clean Inter for all body text — excellent readability

elements: UPPERCASE nav (HOME, SERVICES, PRICING, REVIEWS, FAQ)

footer.responsive: col1 100% tablet, cols 2-3 47% tablet, all 100% mobile

page_sections.name: Hero
page_sections.pattern: 2-column split with heading + form/CTA, gradient overlay on background image

page_sections.name: Stats Bar
page_sections.pattern: 4-column counter row with white text on blue, compact padding

page_sections.name: Services Grid
page_sections.pattern: 3-column icon cards with overline + heading above

page_sections.name: End of Lease Pricing
page_sections.pattern: 3 pricing cards with check-list features, yellow CTA buttons

page_sections.name: Quote Form
page_sections.pattern: 2-column split — left heading/description, right Elementor form widget

page_sections.name: Why Choose Us
page_sections.pattern: 2-column split — left image, right icon-list with 4 differentiators

page_sections.name: Reviews
page_sections.pattern: 3-column testimonial cards with star ratings and attribution

page_sections.name: FAQ
page_sections.pattern: Centered accordion/toggle widget with overline + heading

page_sections.name: CTA Bar
page_sections.pattern: Centered heading + 2 CTA buttons (WhatsApp + Call) on blue
